mapper.select: SELECT * FROM script WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0;
SELECT * FROM script WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY last_updated DESC;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO script (title, content, user_id, is_deleted, last_updated, stage) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{isDeleted}, #{lastUpdated}, #{stage});
mapper.update: UPDATE script SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id};
